title: Reading and Use of English - Part 1
description: Read the text and choose the correct word for each gap.

content.text: The digital revolution has (1) ______ the way we communicate. Gone are the days when we had to wait weeks for a letter to arrive. Today, we can send messages instantly across the globe. However, this immediacy comes at a (2) ______. We now expect instant responses, which can create (3) ______ in both personal and professional relationships.

questions.question: Which word best fits gap 1?
questions.explanation: 'Revolutionized' implica un cambio completo y fundamental.

questions.question: Which word best fits gap 2?
questions.explanation: 'At a cost' es una expresión fija.

questions.question: Which word best fits gap 3?
questions.explanation: 'Tension' se refiere a tensión en relaciones.
